generated_oml:

namespace DTDFVocab = "http://example.com/DTDFVocab"

    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto device for policy-based validation and persistent event storage"
]

    base:desc "Eclipse Ditto connection for bidirectional synchronization"
]

instance HonoConnection : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Eclipse Hono connection for at-least-once message delivery"
]

instance UnrealTwinController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Controller for brokering commands via Eclipse Ditto's DittoDevice and DittoConnection components with pre-execution checks for safety constraints"
]

instance LightingActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Lighting system controlled via LightTwinComponent parameters (on, brightness, color temperature in Kelvin)"
]

instance HVACActuator : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "HVAC system controlled via HVACTwinComponent parameters"
]

instance DittoDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
]

instance HonoDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
]

instance ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Utilizes Model-Driven Engineering principles to transform enriched BIM models into deployable Digital Twin artifacts with minimal manual intervention",
    DTDFVocab:enables [ RealTimeMonitoringService, PredictiveAnalyticsService, DynamicConfigurationService, CustomServiceIntegration ]
]

instance TwinLightEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Provides real-time data synchronization and visualization capabilities for seamless integration of static BIM data with dynamic operational streams",
    DTDFVocab:enables [ RealTimeMonitoringService, VisualizationService ]
]

instance BOREALISEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Provides real-time data synchronization and visualization capabilities for seamless integration of static BIM data with dynamic operational streams",
    DTDFVocab:enables [ RealTimeMonitoringService, VisualizationService ]
]

instance DittoData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Policy-based validation data for value ranges and units, persistent event storage via Eclipse Ditto",
    DTDFVocab:fromData DittoDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo [ ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler, TwinLightEnabler, BOREALISEnabler ]
]

instance HonoData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "At-least-once message delivery data via Eclipse Hono",
    DTDFVocab:fromData HonoDataTransmitted,
    DTDFVocab:inputTo [ ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler, TwinLightEnabler, BOREALISEnabler ]
]

instance BIMGeometricModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric representations derived from Building Information Modeling (BIM) enriched with device-specific metadata (e.g., Revit photometric values for lighting)",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo [ ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler, TwinLightEnabler, BOREALISEnabler ]
]

instance LightingBehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral model implemented through LightTwinComponent class for processing on/off states, brightness, and color temperature in Kelvin",
    DTDFVocab:inputTo [ ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler ]
]

instance HVACBehavioralModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Behavioral model implemented through HVACTwinComponent class for HVAC system parameters",

]

instance LightFeatureParserModel : DTDFVocab:Model [

    DTDFVocab:inputTo [ ModelDrivenEngineeringEnabler ]
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Continuous synchronization between physical and digital assets with interactive visualization for monitoring and control"
]

instance EnergyOptimizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimization of energy consumption through predictive analytics"
]

instance MaintenanceScheduleInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimization of maintenance schedules through predictive analytics"
]

instance DomainSpecificAnalyticsInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Domain-specific analytics and decision-making support across building lifecycle"
]

instance ControlLogicConfigurationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Dynamic configuration of control logic by Building Control Engineers",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance ControlAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Remote control of building operations via interactive visualization interface",
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time monitoring and control of building operations through interactive visualization interfaces for Facility Managers",
    DTDFVocab:provides [ RealTimeMonitoringInsight, ControlAction ]
]

instance PredictiveAnalyticsService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Predictive analytics for optimizing energy consumption and maintenance schedules",
    DTDFVocab:provides [ EnergyOptimizationInsight, MaintenanceScheduleInsight ]
]

instance DynamicConfigurationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Dynamic configuration of control logic by Building Control Engineers",
    DTDFVocab:provides [ ControlLogicConfigurationAction ]
]

instance CustomServiceIntegration : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Custom service integrations via modular extension points for domain-specific analytics and decision-making support across building lifecycle",
    DTDFVocab:provides [ DomainSpecificAnalyticsInsight ]
]

instance VisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization interfaces for Facility Managers to monitor and control building operations",
    DTDFVocab:provides [ RealTimeMonitoringInsight ]
]

instance BuildingInfrastructureEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Digital Twin system under study in AECO domain comprising BIM assets and BCS components including sensors, actuators, and controllers with real-time synchronization, lifecycle management, and integration of static BIM models with dynamic runtime data for simulation, analysis, and optimization.",
    base:contains [ LightingActuator, HVACActuator, DittoDevice, DittoConnection, HonoConnection, UnrealTwinController ]
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data exchange capabilities ensure continuous synchronization between physical buildings and their digital counterparts."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Modular architecture with standardized extension points for service integration, DT Framework acting as a central hub facilitating bidirectional data exchange, and runtime configuration management for adaptability in building life cycle management."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "The Digital Twin lifecycle comprises four stages: initial device modeling within BIM environments where Building Control Engineers define sensors, actuators, and controllers to establish a unified semantic foundation; Model-Driven Engineering (MDE) transformation to automatically generate deployable DT artifacts; runtime operation featuring real-time data exchange and interactive visualization for Facility Managers to monitor and control physical infrastructure; and evolution through modular extension points enabling DT Engineers to integrate custom services and analytics. Lifecycle governance is role-based, with distinct responsibilities assigned to each stakeholder."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model fidelity is maintained through Eclipse Ditto's policy-based validation for sensor data (enforcing value ranges and units) and pre-execution checks for actuator commands. Fault tolerance is achieved via Eclipse Hono's at-least-once message delivery and Ditto's persistent event storage, ensuring resilience against network failures and maintaining synchronization between physical and digital assets."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Interoperability across heterogeneous systems via nonfunctional requirements, BIM model integration, and modular architecture with standardized extension points for custom services and analytics."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The framework adheres to Building Information Modeling (BIM) standards for device modeling, creating a unified semantic foundation. Standardized extension points support interoperability and integration of custom services and analytics, though specific industry standards beyond BIM are not explicitly named."
]
